zh.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell是Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell的兒子，於1298年5月29日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾。他於1326年7月與Christian de Brus III在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯 艾比結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1332年被列為guardian of scotland。他去世於1338年10月7日在蘇格蘭洛-爾享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾洛馬爾吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell是Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell的儿子，于1298年5月29日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾。他于1326年7月与Christian de Brus III在英国苏格兰斯林史爾坎布斯肯尼斯 艾比结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1332年被列为guardian of scotland。他去世于1338年10月7日在苏格兰洛-爾享年40岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛-爾洛馬爾吉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Morey  .

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moree
meanings: French (Morée): habitational name from a place so named in Loir-et-Cher.

variants.name: Morie
meanings: Altered form of Moree, itself perhaps an altered form of English or French Morey (compare 2 below) or of Irish Morrow .
English (London): variant of   Morey  . This surname is rare in Britain.
French: unexplained. This surname is rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell was born on 29 May 1298, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the son of Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. He married Christian de Brus III in July 1326, in Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1332, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as guardian of scotland. He died on 7 October 1338, in Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell est né le 29 mai 1298, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fils de Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. Il a épousé Christian de Brus III en juillet 1326, à Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1332, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est guardian of scotland. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1338, à Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell wurde am 29. Mai 1298 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell geboren. Er hat im Juli 1326 in Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Christian de Brus III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1332, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als guardian of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1338 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell è nato il il 29 maggio 1298 nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland come figlio di Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. Lui sposato Christian de Brus III nel luglio 1326, nel Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1332, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come guardian of scotland. Morì il 7 ottobre 1338, nel Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwellは1298年5月29日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルでAndrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwellの息子として生まれた。1326年7月にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカンブスケネス アビーでChristian de Brus IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1332年，34歳の時，職業はguardian of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1338年10月7日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで40歳で死去し，スコットランドロス-シュアイアローセマーキにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell(은)는 1298년 5월 29일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에서 Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1326년 7월 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 캄버스켄스 애브브이에서 Christian de Brus III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1332년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 guardian of scotland이었다. 그는 1338년 10월 7일 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 로즈마키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell nasceu em 29 de maio de 1298, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland filho de Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. Ele casou-se com Christian de Brus III em julho de 1326, em Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1332, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como guardian of scotland. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1338, em Ross-shire, Scotland, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell родился 29 мая 1298 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Его отца звали Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian de Brus III июль 1326 г. в местности камбускеннет эбби, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1332 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии guardian of scotland. Он умер 7 октября 1338 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности росемарки, росс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Lord of Avoch, Petty and, Bothwell nació el 29 de mayo de 1298, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland como hijo de Andrew Moray 3rd Lord of Bothwell. Se casó con Christian de Brus III en julio de 1326, en Cambuskenneth Abbey, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1332, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era guardian of scotland. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1338, en Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Rosemarkie, Ross-shire, Scotland.
